item.title: Solar Open 100B (Upstage)
item.description: Parameters: 102B License: closed Type: model AI model by Upstage

item.title: K-EXAONE (LG AI Research)
item.description: Parameters: 236B License: closed Type: model AI model by LG AI Research

item.title: VAETKI (NC AI)
item.description: Parameters: 100B License: open Type: model AI model by NC AI

item.title: A.X K1 (SK Telecom)
item.description: Parameters: 519B License: closed Type: model AI model by SK Telecom

item.title: HyperCLOVA X SEED 32B Think (NAVER)
item.description: Parameters: 32B License: closed Type: model AI model by NAVER

item.title: MiniMax-M2.1 (MiniMax)
item.description: Parameters: 229B License: open Type: model AI model by MiniMax

item.title: GLM-4.7 (Z.ai (Zhipu AI))
item.description: Parameters: 358B License: open Type: model AI model by Z.ai (Zhipu AI)

item.title: GPT-5.2 Codex (OpenAI)
item.description: License: closed Type: model AI model by OpenAI

item.title: Nomos 1 (Nous Research)
item.description: Parameters: 30B License: open Type: model AI model by Nous Research

item.title: Nova 2 (Amazon Web Services (AWS))
item.description: License: closed Type: model AI model by Amazon Web Services (AWS)

item.title: mHC 27B (DeepSeek-AI)
item.description: Parameters: mHC 27B License: closed Type: model 27BA4.14B. Scaling tested with 3B MoE on 1T tokens=334:1. "Manifold-Constrained Hyper-Connections (mHC), a general framework that projects the residual connection space of HC onto a specific manifold to restore the identity mapping property, while incorporating rigorous infrastructure optimization to ensure efficiency. Empirical experiments demonstrate that mHC is effective for training at scale, offering tangible performance improvements and superior scalability."

item.title: IQuest-Coder-V1 (IQuestLab)
item.description: Parameters: IQuest-Coder-V1 License: open Type: model "IQuest-Coder-V1 captures the dynamic evolution of software logic, delivering state-of-the-art performance across critical dimensions" https://github.com/IQuestLab/IQuest-Coder-V1

item.title: A.X K1 (SK Hynix)
item.description: Parameters: A.X K1 License: open Type: model 519BA33B.

item.title: K-EXAONE (LG)
item.description: Parameters: K-EXAONE License: open Type: model 236BA23B. “EXAONE”=“EXpert AI for EveryONE”.

item.title: Ranke-4B (UZH)
item.description: Parameters: Ranke-4B License: closed Type: model Base Model: Qwen 3. 600B tokens of pre-(1913, 1929, 1933, 1939, 1946) data only.

item.title: WeDLM (Tencent)
item.description: Parameters: WeDLM License: open Type: model Project page: https://wedlm.github.io/ "WeDLM, a diffusion decoding framework built entirely on standard causal attention to make parallel generation prefix-cache friendly. The core idea is to let each masked position condition on all currently observed tokens while keeping a strict causal mask, achieved by Topological Reordering that moves observed tokens to the physical prefix while preserving their logical positions.. We instantiate WeDLM on both Qwen2.5-7B and Qwen3-8B, utilizing 100B tokens for continued training and 10B tokens for SFT."

item.title: SOLAR Open (Upstage AI)
item.description: Parameters: SOLAR Open License: open Type: model South Korean. 102BA12B. Releasing 31/Dec.

item.title: GLM-4.7 (Z.AI)
item.description: Parameters: GLM-4.7 License: open Type: model 355B-A32B. "context window has been expanded from 128K to 200K tokens"

item.title: NitroGen (NVIDIA)
item.description: Parameters: NitroGen License: open Type: model "NitroGen is a unified vision-to-action model designed to play video games directly from raw frames. It takes video game footage as input and outputs gamepad actions... trained on 40,000 hours of gameplay videos across more than 1,000 games."

item.title: MiMo-V2-Flash (Xiaomi)
item.description: Parameters: MiMo-V2-Flash License: open Type: model 309BA15B.

item.title: FunctionGemma (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: FunctionGemma License: open Type: model "FunctionGemma, a specialized version of our Gemma 3 270M model tuned for function calling. It is designed as a strong base for further training into custom, fast, private, local agents that translate natural language into executable API actions."

item.title: T5Gemma 2 (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: T5Gemma 2 License: open Type: model Base model: Gemma 3. Dataset: Gemma 3 4B checkpoint (4T) + pretraining (2T)=6T.

item.title: Gemini 3 Flash (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: Gemini 3 Flash License: open Type: model Announce: https://deepmind.google/models/gemini/flash/

item.title: NVIDIA-Nemotron-3-Nano-30B-A3B (NVIDIA)
item.description: Parameters: NVIDIA-Nemotron-3-Nano-30B-A3B License: open Type: model Knowledge cutoff November 28, 2025 (post).

item.title: Bolmo (Allen AI)
item.description: Parameters: Bolmo License: open Type: model Base Model: Olmo 3 7B. Announce: https://allenai.org/blog/bolmo

item.title: EuroLLM-22B (Consortium)
item.description: Parameters: EuroLLM-22B License: open Type: model A fully open language model developed in Europe.

item.title: LLaDA2.0 Flash (Inclusion AI)
item.description: Parameters: LLaDA2.0 Flash License: open Type: model Base Model: Ling-flash-2.0: 103B total parameters with 6.1B activated. "largest diffusion language model to date"

item.title: GPT-5.2 (OpenAI)
item.description: Parameters: GPT-5.2 License: open Type: model "GPT‑5.2 sets a new state of the art across many benchmarks, including GDPval, where it outperforms industry professionals at well-specified knowledge work tasks spanning 44 occupations." Announce: https://openai.com/index/introducing-gpt-5-2/ MMLU is for Spanish.

item.title: Apriel-1.6-15B-Thinker (ServiceNow)
item.description: Parameters: Apriel-1.6-15B-Thinker License: open Type: model

item.title: Motif 2 12.7B (Motif-Technologies)
item.description: Parameters: Motif 2 12.7B License: open Type: model

item.title: Devstral 2 (Mistral)
item.description: Parameters: Devstral 2 License: open Type: model SWE-bench Verified=72.2%.

item.title: Nanbeige4-3B-Base (Nanbeige4-3B-Base)
item.description: Parameters: Nanbeige4-3B-Base License: open Type: model

item.title: HY 2.0 (Tencent)
item.description: Parameters: HY 2.0 License: open Type: model 406BA32B.

item.title: K2-V2 (MBZUAI)
item.description: Parameters: K2-V2 License: open Type: model 8.5x more tokens trained than K2 (1.4T v 12T). Project page: https://ifm.ai/k2/

item.title: Trinity-Mini (Arcee AI)
item.description: Parameters: Trinity-Mini License: open Type: model 26BA3B. "we worked closely with Prime Intellect. They not only served the H100 clusters Datology used to generate synthetic data, they have been deeply involved in helping scale our training setup to the GPU footprint required for a fully frontier sized model, including the current 2048 B300 GPU configuration for Trinity Large."

item.title: Nova 2 Pro (Amazon)
item.description: Parameters: Nova 2 Pro License: open Type: model "Nova 2 Pro is Amazon's most intelligent reasoning model that can process text, images, video, and speech to generate text."

item.title: Mistral Large 3 (Mistral)
item.description: Parameters: Mistral Large 3 License: open Type: model 675BA41B. "Mistral Large 3 joins the ranks of frontier instruction-fine-tuned open-source models." EU tech doc: https://legal.cms.mistral.ai/assets/1e37fffd-7ea5-469b-822f-05dcfbb43623

item.title: DeepSeek-V3.2-Speciale (DeepSeek-AI)
item.description: Parameters: DeepSeek-V3.2-Speciale License: open Type: model The word 'Speciale' may be a reference to Ferrari. "It shows gold-medal performance in the IOI 2025, ICPC World Final 2025, IMO 2025, and CMO 2025." API: https://api-docs.deepseek.com/news/news251201

item.title: DeepSeekMath-V2 (DeepSeek)
item.description: Parameters: 685B License: open Type: model AI model by DeepSeek

item.title: Claude Opus 4.5 (Anthropic)
item.description: License: closed Type: model AI model by Anthropic

item.title: Olmo 3 (Allen Institute for AI (Ai2))
item.description: Parameters: 32B License: open Type: model AI model by Allen Institute for AI (Ai2)

item.title: Grok 4.1 Fast (xAI)
item.description: License: closed Type: model AI model by xAI

item.title: GPT-5.1-Codex-Max (OpenAI)
item.description: License: closed Type: model AI model by OpenAI

item.title: Gemini 3 Pro (Google DeepMind)
item.description: License: closed Type: model AI model by Google DeepMind

item.title: Grok 4.1 (xAI)
item.description: License: closed Type: model AI model by xAI

item.title: GPT-5.1 (OpenAI)
item.description: License: closed Type: model AI model by OpenAI

item.title: GPT-5.1 Instant (OpenAI)
item.description: License: closed Type: model AI model by OpenAI

item.title: GPT-5.1-Codex (OpenAI)
item.description: License: closed Type: model AI model by OpenAI

item.title: Kimi K2 Thinking (Moonshot)
item.description: Parameters: 1T License: open Type: model AI model by Moonshot

item.title: Gen-0 (Generalist)
item.description: Parameters: 10B License: closed Type: model AI model by Generalist

item.title: DeepSeek-Math-V2 (DeepSeek-AI)
item.description: Parameters: DeepSeek-Math-V2 License: open Type: model "DeepSeekMath-V2, demonstrates strong theorem-proving capabilities, achieving gold-level scores on IMO 2025 and CMO 2024 and a near-perfect 118/120 on Putnam 2024 with scaled testtime compute. "

item.title: Orchestrator-8B (NVIDIA)
item.description: Parameters: Orchestrator-8B License: open Type: model Base Model: Qwen3-8B

item.title: INTELLECT-3 (Prime Intellect)
item.description: Parameters: INTELLECT-3 License: open Type: model Base: GLM-4.5-Air-Base model. 106BA12B. Announce: https://www.primeintellect.ai/blog/intellect-3

item.title: Fara-7B (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: Fara-7B License: open Type: model "Fara-7B is Microsoft's first agentic small language model (SLM) designed specifically for computer use. With only 7 billion parameters, Fara-7B is an ultra-compact Computer Use Agent (CUA)...Current production baselines leverage Qwen 2.5-VL (7B)."

item.title: Claude Opus 4.5 (Anthropic)
item.description: Parameters: Claude Opus 4.5 License: open Type: model "the best model in the world for coding, agents, and computer use." Announce: https://www.anthropic.com/news/claude-opus-4-5

item.title: Nemotron Elastic (NVIDIA)
item.description: Parameters: Nemotron Elastic License: open Type: model "Nemotron Elastic, a framework for building reasoning-oriented LLMs, including hybrid Mamba-Attention architectures, that embed multiple nested submodels within a single parent model, each optimized for different deployment configurations and budgets. Each of these submodels shares weights with the parent model and can be extracted zero-shot during deployment without additional training or fine-tuning...We apply Nemotron Elastic to the Nemotron Nano V2 12B model, simultaneously producing a 9B and a 6B model using only 110B training tokens"

item.title: GeoVista (Tencent)
item.description: Parameters: GeoVista License: open Type: model Base model: Qwen2.5-VL-7B-Instruct. "GeoVista, an agentic model that seamlessly integrates tool invocation within the reasoning loop, including an image-zoom-in tool to magnify regions of interest and a web-search tool to retrieve related web information. " Project page: https://ekonwang.github.io/geo-vista/

item.title: OLMo 3 (Allen AI)
item.description: Parameters: OLMo 3 License: open Type: model Announce: https://allenai.org/blog/olmo3

item.title: Gemini 3 Pro (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: Gemini 3 Pro License: open Type: model "The knowledge cutoff date for Gemini 3 Pro was January 2025."

item.title: Grok 4.1 (xAI)
item.description: Parameters: Grok 4.1 License: open Type: model

item.title: Baguettotron (PleIAs)
item.description: Parameters: Baguettotron License: open Type: model "The name is both a nod to French origins and to the unusual shape of the model: with 80 layers, Baguettotron is currently the deepest SLM in its size range."

item.title: ERNIE-5.0-Preview-1022 (Baidu)
item.description: Parameters: ERNIE-5.0-Preview-1022 License: open Type: model Very low performance on ALPrompt. 2.4T params confirmed: https://global.chinadaily.com.cn/a/202511/13/WS691571bda310d6866eb29500.html

item.title: GPT-5.1 (OpenAI)
item.description: Parameters: GPT-5.1 License: open Type: model Personality change via fine-tuning. GPQA (no tools) increased from GPT-5=85.7 to GPT-5.1=88.1. MMLU is for Spanish.

item.title: TiDAR (NVIDIA)
item.description: Parameters: TiDAR License: open Type: model Base model: Qwen3-8B (36T) + 150B continual training. "TiDAR, a sequence-level hybrid architecture that drafts tokens (Thinking) in Diffusion and samples final outputs (Talking) AutoRegressively - all within a single forward pass using specially designed structured attention masks"

item.title: SONIC (NVIDIA)
item.description: Parameters: SONIC License: open Type: model Supersizing mOtion tracking for Natural humanoId Control (SONIC). Training dataset calcs: (700 hours * 3,600 seconds/hour * 50 frames/second ) / 1 frame/token = 126M tokens (refined to 100M+ after rigorous filtering ); 150,000 steps * 6.67M tokens/batch = 1.0T total tokens seen during training.

item.title: JustRL-Nemotron-1.5B (Tsinghua)
item.description: Parameters: JustRL-Nemotron-1.5B License: open Type: model "JustRL, a simple recipe with fixed hyperparameters, achieves state-of-the-art performance on two different 1.5B base models (54.5% and 64.3% across 9 math benchmarks) while using 2× less compute than sophisticated approaches. The same hyperparameters transfer across both models without tuning, and training remains stable over thousands of steps without intervention. This suggests the field may be adding complexity to solve problems that disappear with a stable, scaled-up baseline."

item.title: ERNIE-4.5-VL-28B-A3B-Thinking (Baidu)
item.description: Parameters: ERNIE-4.5-VL-28B-A3B-Thinking License: open Type: model 28B-A3B. Open-sourced 12/Nov/2025 from Jun/2025 release.

item.title: HOPE (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: HOPE License: partial Type: model "Combining our self-modifying sequence model with the continuum memory system, we present a learning module, called HOPE, showing promising results in language modeling, continual learning, and long-context reasoning tasks." Announce: https://research.google/blog/introducing-nested-learning-a-new-ml-paradigm-for-continual-learning/ May be released after paper is public.

item.title: Kimi K2 Thinking (Moonshot AI)
item.description: Parameters: Kimi K2 Thinking License: open Type: model 1TA32B. 1T parameters and 384 experts. Open source SOTA. HLE=51.0 on text-only subset, compare to Grok-4 HLE=50.7 also on text-only, but Grok-4 HLE=44.4 on HLE full, ∴ Kimi K2 Thinking HLE≈44 full (estimated).

item.title: Ling-1T (Inclusion AI)
item.description: Parameters: Ling-1T License: open Type: model 1TA50B.

item.title: GEN-0 (Generalist)
item.description: Parameters: GEN-0 License: partial Type: model "GEN-0, a new class of embodied foundation models built for multimodal training directly on high-fidelity raw physical interaction. Its architecture builds on the strengths of vision and language models while also going beyond them—natively designed to capture human-level reflexes and physical commonsense. One core feature is Harmonic Reasoning, in which the models are trained to simultaneously think and act seamlessly... GEN-0 is pretrained on our in-house robotics dataset, which includes over 270,000 hours of real-world diverse manipulation data, growing at a rate of 10,000 hours a week and accelerating."

item.title: Emu3.5 (Beijing Academy of Artificial Intelligence / BAAI)
item.category: Beijing Academy of Artificial Intelligence / BAAI
item.description: Parameters: 34.1B License: open Type: model AI model by Beijing Academy of Artificial Intelligence / BAAI

item.title: Kimi Linear (Moonshot)
item.description: Parameters: 48B License: open Type: model AI model by Moonshot

item.title: Composer (Cursor)
item.description: License: closed Type: model AI model by Cursor

item.title: SWE-1.5 (Cognition)
item.description: Parameters: 300B License: closed Type: model AI model by Cognition

item.title: Tongyi DeepResearch (Alibaba)
item.description: Parameters: 30.5B License: open Type: model AI model by Alibaba

item.title: MiniMax-M2 (MiniMax)
item.description: Parameters: 229B License: open Type: model AI model by MiniMax

item.title: LoongRL 7B (Microsoft Research Asia,Shanghai Jiao Tong University,Carnegie Mellon University (CMU))
item.category: Microsoft Research Asia,Shanghai Jiao Tong University,Carnegie Mellon University (CMU)
item.description: Parameters: 7B License: closed Type: model AI model by Microsoft Research Asia,Shanghai Jiao Tong University,Carnegie Mellon University (CMU)

item.category: Microsoft Research Asia,Shanghai Jiao Tong University,Carnegie Mellon University (CMU)

item.title: Lapa LLM (Ukrainian Catholic University,Igor Sikorsky Kyiv Polytechnic Institute,AGH University of Krakow,Lviv Polytechnic)
item.category: Ukrainian Catholic University,Igor Sikorsky Kyiv Polytechnic Institute,AGH University of Krakow,Lviv Polytechnic
item.description: Parameters: 12B License: open Type: model AI model by Ukrainian Catholic University,Igor Sikorsky Kyiv Polytechnic Institute,AGH University of Krakow,Lviv Polytechnic

item.title: Ring-mini-linear-2.0 (Ant Group)
item.description: Parameters: 16.4B License: open Type: model AI model by Ant Group

item.description: Parameters: 104.2B License: open Type: model AI model by Ant Group

item.title: Deepseek OCR (DeepSeek)
item.description: Parameters: 3B License: open Type: model AI model by DeepSeek

item.title: BAPO 32B (Fudan University,Shanghai Qiji Zhifeng)
item.description: Parameters: 32B License: closed Type: model AI model by Fudan University,Shanghai Qiji Zhifeng

item.title: Odyssey 102B (Anthrogen)

item.description: License: closed Type: model AI model by Anthropic

item.title: Veo 3.1 (Google DeepMind)
item.description: License: closed Type: model AI model by Google DeepMind

item.title: Llama 4 Scout + ScaleRL (Meta AI)
item.description: Parameters: 109B License: closed Type: model AI model by Meta AI

item.title: MAI-Image-1 (Microsoft)
item.description: License: closed Type: model AI model by Microsoft

item.title: C2S-Scale (Google Research,Yale University,Google DeepMind,Brown University,University of Southern California)
item.category: Google Research,Yale University,Google DeepMind,Brown University,University of Southern California
item.description: Parameters: 27B License: open Type: model AI model by Google Research,Yale University,Google DeepMind,Brown University,University of Southern California

item.title: Ring-1T (Ant Group)
item.description: Parameters: 1T License: open Type: model AI model by Ant Group

item.title: Ling-1T (Ant Group)
item.description: Parameters: 1T License: open Type: model AI model by Ant Group

item.title: Grok Imagine (xAI)
item.description: License: closed Type: model AI model by xAI

item.title: GPT-5 Pro (OpenAI)
item.description: License: closed Type: model AI model by OpenAI

item.title: Gemini 2.5 Computer Use (Google)
item.description: License: closed Type: model AI model by Google

item.title: Tiny Recursive Model (TRM-Att) (Samsung SAIT AI Lab)
item.description: Parameters: 7M License: closed Type: model AI model by Samsung SAIT AI Lab

item.title: Granite-4.0-H-Tiny (IBM)
item.description: Parameters: 7B License: open Type: model AI model by IBM

item.title: Granite-4.0-H-Micro (IBM)
item.description: Parameters: 3B License: open Type: model AI model by IBM

item.title: Granite-4.0-H-Small (IBM)
item.description: Parameters: 32B License: open Type: model AI model by IBM

item.title: CALM (Wechat)
item.description: Parameters: CALM License: open Type: model "Continuous Autoregressive Language Models (CALM), a paradigm shift from discrete next-token prediction to continuous next-vector prediction. CALM uses a high-fidelity autoencoder to compress a chunk of K tokens into a single continuous vector, from which the original tokens can be reconstructed with over 99.9% accuracy... We train our models on the Pile uncopyrighted dataset (Gao et al., 2020). The raw text is processed with the Llama 3 tokenizer (Grattafiori et al., 2024), resulting in a training set of ∼230B tokens."

item.title: Kimi-Linear (Moonshot AI)
item.description: Parameters: Kimi-Linear License: open Type: model 48B-A3B. "Kimi Linear is a hybrid linear attention architecture that outperforms traditional full attention methods across various contexts, including short, long, and reinforcement learning (RL) scaling regimes. At its core is Kimi Delta Attention (KDA)—a refined version of Gated DeltaNet that introduces a more efficient gating mechanism to optimize the use of finite-state RNN memory."

item.title: MiniMax-M2 (MiniMax)
item.description: Parameters: MiniMax-M2 License: open Type: model 230B-A10B.

item.title: MACE-MH-1 (Cambridge/LBNL)
item.description: Parameters: MACE-MH-1 License: open Type: model MACE-MH-1 (Multi-Head 1). Features Multiple Heads (OMAT PBE, OMOL r2scan, OC20) to maintain high accuracy across domains

item.title: DeepSeek-OCR (DeepSeek-AI)
item.description: Parameters: DeepSeek-OCR License: open Type: model 2D vision tokens for 1D text achieves huge compression. Encoder/Decoder: DeepEncoder 380M (80M SAM-base + 300M CLIP-large), DeepSeek-3B-MoE (A570M).

item.title: UserLM-8b (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: UserLM-8b License: open Type: model "we trained UserLM-8b to simulate the “user” role in conversation (by training it to predict user turns in a large corpus of conversations called WildChat)."

item.title: CoDA (Salesforce)
item.description: Parameters: CoDA License: open Type: model "diffusion coder trained on TPU [Google TPU v4-1024 VM]"

item.title: TRM (Samsung)
item.description: Parameters: TRM License: open Type: model "Tiny Recursive Model (TRM), a much simpler recursive reasoning approach that achieves significantly higher generalization than HRM, while using a single tiny network with only 2 layers"

item.title: Granite-4.0 Small (IBM)
item.description: Parameters: Granite-4.0 Small License: open Type: model 32B-A9B. Announce: https://www.ibm.com/new/announcements/ibm-granite-4-0-hyper-efficient-high-performance-hybrid-models

item.title: Lucid Origin (Leonardo AI)
item.description: License: closed Type: model AI model by Leonardo AI

item.title: Ling-mini-base-2.0-20T (Ant Group)

item.title: Chatterbox Multilingual (Resemble AI)
item.description: License: open Type: model AI model by Resemble AI

item.title: Apertus 8B (ETH Zurich,Ecole Polytechnique F´ed´erale de Lausanne (EPFL),Swiss National Supercomputing Centre (CSCS),Swisscom)
item.category: ETH Zurich,Ecole Polytechnique F´ed´erale de Lausanne (EPFL),Swiss National Supercomputing Centre (CSCS),Swisscom
item.description: Parameters: 8B License: open Type: model AI model by ETH Zurich,Ecole Polytechnique F´ed´erale de Lausanne (EPFL),Swiss National Supercomputing Centre (CSCS),Swisscom

item.title: Apertus 70B (ETH Zurich,Ecole Polytechnique F´ed´erale de Lausanne (EPFL),Swiss National Supercomputing Centre (CSCS),Swisscom)
item.category: ETH Zurich,Ecole Polytechnique F´ed´erale de Lausanne (EPFL),Swiss National Supercomputing Centre (CSCS),Swisscom

item.title: GLM-4.6 (Z.AI)
item.description: Parameters: GLM-4.6 License: open Type: model 355B-A32B. "context window has been expanded from 128K to 200K tokens"

item.title: Ring-1T-preview (InclusionAI)
item.description: Parameters: Ring-1T-preview License: open Type: model 1T-A48.5B.

item.title: Claude Sonnet 4.5 (Anthropic)
item.description: Parameters: Claude Sonnet 4.5 License: open Type: model The Claude Sonnet 4.5 "system card" is an absolute farce. Announce: https://www.anthropic.com/news/claude-sonnet-4-5

item.title: Gemini Robotics 1.5 (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: Gemini Robotics 1.5 License: open Type: model 2. "vision-language-action (VLA) model turns visual information and instructions into motor commands for a robot to perform a task." Available to select partners.

item.title: Gemini Robotics-ER 1.5 (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: Gemini Robotics-ER 1.5 License: open Type: model 1. "vision-language model (VLM) reasons about the physical world, natively calls digital tools and creates detailed, multi-step plans to complete a mission." Available to all devs.

item.title: TimesFM-ICF (Google)
item.description: Parameters: TimesFM-ICF License: closed Type: model TimesFM-ICF is 6.8% more accurate than TimesFM (Base). Time-series forecasting only. 'a large pretraining corpus of 100B real world time-points' may be more than 100B tokens.

item.title: Qwen3-Max (Alibaba)
item.description: Parameters: Qwen3-Max License: open Type: model "Qwen3-Max-Thinking — still under active training — is already demonstrating remarkable potential. When augmented with tool usage and scaled test-time compute, the Thinking variant has achieved 100% on challenging reasoning benchmarks such as AIME 25 and HMMT. "

item.title: Qwen3-Omni (Alibaba)
item.description: Parameters: Qwen3-Omni License: open Type: model "Qwen3-Omni is a unified end-to-end model capable of processing multiple modalities, such as text, audio, image and video, and generating real-time text or speech response."... "pretraining utilizes a large-scale dataset containing approximately 2 trillion tokens, with the following distribution across modalities: text (0.57 trillion), audio (0.77 trillion), image (0.82 trillion), video (0.05 trillion), and video-audio (0.05 trillion)."

item.title: DeepSeek-V3.1-Terminus (DeepSeek-AI)
item.description: Parameters: DeepSeek-V3.1-Terminus License: open Type: model Hybrid reasoning. Dataset tokens: https://x.com/deepseek_ai/status/1958417072536608952 HLE: https://x.com/deepseek_ai/status/1958417068568481854/photo/2

item.title: Isaac 0.1 (Perceptron)
item.description: Parameters: Isaac 0.1 License: open Type: model "perceptive-language model...delivering capabilities that meet or exceed those of models over 50 times its size. Founded by the team behind Meta's Chameleon multimodal models, Perceptron is tackling a fundamental challenge: bringing the power of physical AI to the dynamic, multimodal, and real-time environments we live and work in."

item.title: Grok 4 Fast (xAI)
item.description: Parameters: Grok 4 Fast License: open Type: model "2M token context window, and a unified architecture that blends reasoning and non-reasoning modes in one model."

item.title: VaultGemma (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: VaultGemma License: open Type: model "Differential Privacy (DP) has emerged as the gold standard, providing a rigorous, mathematical framework to limit the influence of any single example in the training data on the resulting model. A model trained with DP provably bounds the reconstruction or leakage of information tied to individual data points." Announce: https://research.google/blog/vaultgemma-the-worlds-most-capable-differentially-private-llm/

item.title: Qwen3-Next-80B-A3B (Alibaba)
item.description: Parameters: Qwen3-Next-80B-A3B License: open Type: model "Qwen3-Next introduces several key improvements: a hybrid attention mechanism, a highly sparse Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) structure, training-stability-friendly optimizations, and a multi-token prediction mechanism for faster inference."

item.title: K2-Think (MBZUAI)
item.description: Parameters: K2-Think License: open Type: model "Built on the Qwen2.5 base model, our system shows that smaller models can compete at the highest levels by combining advanced post-training and test-time computation techniques. The approach is based on six key technical pillars: Long Chain-of-thought Supervised Finetuning, Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR), Agentic planning prior to reasoning, Test-time Scaling, Speculative Decoding, and Inference-optimized Hardware, all using publicly available open-source datasets."

item.title: mmBERT (JHU)
item.description: Parameters: mmBERT License: open Type: model "a modern multilingual encoder trained on 3T tokens and 1833 languages. We introduce several novel elements in training: an inverse masking schedule and a cascading annealed language learning schedule for multilingual data" Announce: https://huggingface.co/blog/mmbert

item.title: ERNIE X1.1 (Baidu)
item.description: Parameters: ERNIE X1.1 License: open Type: model

item.title: ERNIE-4.5-21B-A3B-Thinking (Baidu)
item.description: Parameters: ERNIE-4.5-21B-A3B-Thinking License: open Type: model

item.title: Klear-46B-A2.5B (Kuaishou)
item.description: Parameters: Klear-46B-A2.5B License: open Type: model 46B-A2.5B.

item.title: TildeOpen-30b (Tilde AI)
item.description: Parameters: TildeOpen-30b License: open Type: model "language data from across Europe"

item.title: Qwen3-Max-Preview (Alibaba)
item.description: Parameters: Qwen3-Max-Preview License: open Type: model GPQA score is SuperGPQA. "our biggest model yet, with over 1 trillion parameters"

item.title: Kimi K2-Instruct-0905 (Moonshot AI)
item.description: Parameters: Kimi K2-Instruct-0905 License: open Type: model 1TA32B. 1T parameters and 384 experts. Open source SOTA.

item.title: Apertus (ETH Zürich)
item.description: Parameters: Apertus License: open Type: model "Apertus – Latin for “open”" 1,811 languages. Announce: https://ethz.ch/en/news-and-events/eth-news/news/2025/09/press-release-apertus-a-fully-open-transparent-multilingual-language-model.html

item.title: LongCat-Flash (Meituan)
item.description: Parameters: LongCat-Flash License: open Type: model 560B-A18.6B–31.3B (27B on average). Announce: https://lmsys.org/blog/2025-09-01-sglang-longcat-flash/

item.title: Baichuan-M2 (Baichuan)
item.description: Parameters: Baichuan-M2 License: open Type: model Base: Qwen2.5. "medical augmented reasoning model"
